title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on charities and social responsibility.

questions.question: Do you think it is the responsibility of businesses to contribute to society beyond simply making a profit?
How effective do you think charity and voluntary work is in addressing deep-rooted social problems, compared to government action?

script.text: Do you think it is the responsibility of businesses to contribute to society beyond simply making a profit?
How effective do you think charity and voluntary work is in addressing deep-rooted social problems, compared to government action?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
